* **IMMZD5DTTBEEncounterElements**

## Library: IMMZD5DTTBEEncounterElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD5DTTBEEncounterElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-04-03 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD5DTTBEEncounterElements |

 
This library defines encounter-based elements for TBE used throughout the Immunization CPG
